name: @pryzm/plugin-stair
description: PRYZM 2 — Stair plugin (S14-T1). Headless half: Store<StairData>, typed errors, 8 handlers (CreateStair / DeleteStair / MoveStair / SetStairType / SetTreadCount / SetRiserHeight / SetWidth / MirrorStair). Producer (packages/geometry-kernel/src/producers/stair.ts) emits a BufferGeometryDescriptor with tread + riser + side material slots and supports straight / l-shape / u-shape runs (spiral falls back to straight for v1). Stair → Handrail cascade lives in plugins/cross/stair-handrail.ts. Committer / tool live under src/committer/.
